title: elaphoglossum resinosum
intro: Elaphoglossum resinosum is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum resinosum include its ability to help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Elaphoglossum resinosum typically involve drying and processing the plant material into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
